base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of warp_zone_welcome_text — a ui from 1985 super mario bros. 'WELCOME TO WARP ZONE!' text rendered over starry-black background — appears after entering vine / secret pipe leading to warp area. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 'WELCOME TO WARP ZONE!' text rendered over starry-black background — appears after entering vine / secret pipe leading to warp area; static, not animated
